channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: 7 killed and dozens injured following series of weekend shootings in Chicago
item.description: Police say a spate of shootings in Chicago has led to at least 38 injuries and seven deaths since Friday evening.

item.title: In Taylor Swift’s beach town, every clue becomes a wedding rumor
Newly released video captures the aftermath of a fatal teen stabbing at a Texas track meet
